input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #6309 [Automation] java run fails for net.bytebuddy:byte-buddy-agent:1.11.17; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests that exercise real runtime attachment depend on running on a full JDK with the jdk.attach module available; this is normally true in the Gradle/JDK test environment but remains subject to local verification.

Generated tests should not assume a fake AttachmentProvider makes ByteBuddyAgent.install return null; newer Byte Buddy versions validate that Instrumentation was initialized and can throw IllegalStateException if the mocked attach path does not call Installer.agentmain/premain.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker service, environment variable, or system property is required before meaningful coverage is reachable for net.bytebuddy:byte-buddy-agent:1.11.17. The artifact is a self-contained Java agent helper; its optional/provided JNA path is not required for normal ByteBuddyAgent.install coverage on a JDK with the jdk.attach module.
